text: As I move from the quiet, structured hallway with its glass walls and fire safety reminders into the vibrant R+D space, I sense the transition from order to curiosity. The text on the display speaks to me: 'I sense confusion and a lack of clarity... it reminds me how easily our perception can become blurred.' I feel intrigued, a bit disoriented, but alive with the awareness that, in this environment of research and development, uncertainty is not a defect but a signal that discovery is possible. I welcome this ambiguity. It is through confusion that new understanding emerges.
